goals.title: Legal and finance source research foundation
goals.objective: Produce static, PII-safe research evidence for remaining needs_legal_review legal sources using Korean-law MCP, and for finance-source channels using available MCP discovery plus official/public sources where needed.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal source audit: inspect v1 domain source and decision resources, verify remaining needs_legal_review candidates with Korean-law MCP search/get_law_text/legal_analysis where available, and produce a static source audit.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json parses with json.tool and lists source ids, MCP lookup status, article candidates, and impacted downstream route/decision ids.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-legal-source-audit.json; python3 -m json.tool passed; Korean-law MCP verified 16 current legal citations with 0 errors; audit identifies 3 needs_legal_review sources, usage counts, dispositions, and article candidates.
successCriteria.notes: No raw law text stored; evidence contains lawId/MST/article/status metadata only.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance source channel audit: inspect available MCP surfaces for finance-specific tooling, then identify official/public source channels for interest, allocation, delinquency, and review-threshold judgments.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json parses with json.tool and records finance MCP availability/disposition plus official source candidates.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-finance-source-channel-audit.json; python3 -m json.tool passed; Korean-law MCP verified 11 finance-law citations; tool_search/discover_tools found no dedicated finance MCP, so plan records Korean-law MCP plus official/public web source channels.
successCriteria.notes: Official source candidates recorded: law.go.kr, ecfs.scourt.go.kr, fss.or.kr, bok.or.kr.

successCriteria.scenario: Boundary regression: confirm this research foundation does not mutate deployment/runbook surfaces or remote MCP/client docs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A git status/diff evidence note shows no staged/committed changes under deploy/recova-mcp-lab, deploy/cloudflare-mcp-proxy, deploy/vercel-mcp, or MCP client runbooks for this goal.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-1-boundary-regression.txt; git diff --cached --name-only over deployment/runbook/client-doc paths returned empty; rg PII/path/token scan over task-1 evidence returned no findings.
successCriteria.notes: Pre-existing unrelated deployment/runbook working-tree changes remain untouched and unstaged.

goals.evidence: Goal 1 complete: legal-source audit JSON, finance-source channel audit JSON, and boundary-regression note created; json.tool, PII/path scan, and deployment/runbook cached diff boundary passed; all three criteria recorded pass.

goals.title: Scenario coverage and human-review contract foundation
goals.objective: Inventory scenario gaps against the claim-domain route catalog and define a validated human-review operator workflow contract for action packets and governance records.

successCriteria.scenario: Scenario coverage inventory: compare route catalog, workflow states, StopGate/domain decision reasons, finance review triggers, and existing fixtures to identify missing practical collection scenarios.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json parses with json.tool and lists covered/missing scenario families with suggested fixture ids.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-scenario-gap-inventory.json; json.tool passed; inventory compares 32 routes, 19 route families, 12 workflow states, 14 StopGate rules, 11 finance components, 6 review triggers, 6 action packet schemas, and 9 current synthetic scenarios; identifies 14 uncovered route families and recommended scenario ids.
successCriteria.notes: Coverage currently centers on 5 route families; recommended scenarios target real estate, business receivable, movable asset, inheritance, insolvency, monitoring, and other gaps.

successCriteria.scenario: Human-review workflow contract: define operator review states, allowed decisions, required source_refs/audit fields, and explicit non-execution constraints for action packets/governance records.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A validated JSON contract or markdown-backed smoke evidence exists for human-review operator workflow, and PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-human-review-workflow-contract.json; json.tool passed; PII/path/token scan returned no findings; contract defines operator review statuses, decision codes, required audit/source fields, and non-execution forbidden payload boundaries.
successCriteria.notes: Review approval is internal-review only and never changes direct_execution_allowed to true.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: existing local MCP source surface still exposes 25 tools in the required order after scenario/review planning.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A local Python smoke records MCP tool count=25, existing 21 first, four claim-domain tools appended, with no token/path leak.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Created .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-2-mcp-tool-order-smoke.json; /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 smoke asserted 25 tools, first debt-collection tool list preserved, and the four claim-domain tools appended in order.
successCriteria.notes: Smoke printed MCP_TOOL_ORDER_OK; no token/path leak patterns found in task-2 evidence.

goals.evidence: Goal 2 complete: scenario gap inventory, human-review workflow contract, and MCP 25-tool order smoke evidence created; json.tool, PII/path scan, MCP smoke, and diff check passed; all three criteria recorded pass.

goals.title: Resource and fixture expansion
goals.objective: Replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records, expand rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures, and preserve JSON validity plus local MCP 25-tool ordering.

successCriteria.scenario: Legal/resource update: replace or explicitly disposition review-needed source records using Goal 1 audit outputs, then rerun relevant validators.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Updated static resources/evidence plus validator output show no unresolved un-dispositioned source records introduced by this wave.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: A commit cbb60d46 and merged main evidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-3-source-dispositions.json plus task-3-leader-merge-verification.txt; source dispositions keep three needs_legal_review records conservative while adding machine-readable replacement/supporting refs; validators passed. cleanup: no runtime process spawned; team member A archived; worktree clean.
successCriteria.notes: C-goal3-review accepted C001; deployment/runbook boundary unchanged.

successCriteria.scenario: Fixture expansion: add rare-case synthetic claim-domain fixtures for missing scenario families, including protected income/property, stale/disputed finance data, partial payments, insolvency/bankruptcy, service/finality uncertainty, and identity uncertainty where applicable.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused integration tests/evidence pass over added fixtures and demonstrate possible/review_required/blocked diversity without raw PII.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: B commit d22d03c4 and merged main evidence: .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-3-expanded-scenarios-happy.json plus task-3-leader-merge-verification.txt; fixture bundle now has 26 scenarios, 22 route ids, status diversity blocked=9 missing_facts=6 possible=5 review_required=6; focused pipeline tests passed. cleanup: no runtime process spawned; team member B archived; worktree clean.
successCriteria.notes: C-goal3-review accepted expanded rare-case scenario coverage and context-aware PII/path scan.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: JSON resources and local MCP order remain valid after resource/fixture additions.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: json.tool over changed resources/evidence passes and a local MCP smoke records 25-tool order unchanged.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Merged main evidence .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/task-3-leader-merge-verification.txt and task-3-goal3-review.md; JSON resources/evidence parse, local MCP order reports 25 tools with four claim-domain tools appended, context-aware PII/path scan has no findings, deployment boundary diff is empty. cleanup: team team-9252afb4 archived; member threads archived; no live QA process remains.
successCriteria.notes: Initial broad scan false positives were resolved by context-aware scan; C artifact records addendum.

goals.evidence: Goal 3 complete: A/B integrated on master via cf58177a/d65ea884; source dispositions, expanded fixtures, leader verification, and C review accepted; JSON/tests/validators/MCP/PII/deployment boundary passed.

goals.title: Decision StopGate finance and review hardening
goals.objective: Strengthen finance/review, domain decision, and StopGate regressions so expanded knowledge remains deterministic, traceable, and review-safe.

successCriteria.scenario: Finance/review hardening: add or strengthen deterministic tests for stale finance source version, unsupported allocation inputs, disputed amounts, and manual-review-required finance triggers.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused finance/domain decision tests and happy/failure evidence pass, with source_refs and review reasons preserved.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: A commit b7668289 and merged master surface 85586bca harden finance review decisions: unsupported allocations, disputed placeholder refs, stale finance version, and manual review triggers now produce deterministic review-safe results; evidence task-4-finance-review-* plus leader 52-test suite passed.
successCriteria.notes: A worktree reported clean; no StopGate, deployment, runbook, or remote MCP files touched.

successCriteria.scenario: StopGate/domain decision hardening: expanded rules produce conservative review/hold results for legal-source uncertainty, protected-property/income risks, bankruptcy/insolvency signals, and execution-title/service/finality uncertainty.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Focused StopGate/domain decision tests plus JSON evidence pass and no case falsely clears to execution-ready behavior.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: B commit 9c3c046a and merged master surface 85586bca harden domain-v1 StopGate proof matching: negated or uncertain service/finality/execution-clause values remain 보류, positive proof variants still clear, and protected-property/insolvency blockers stay conservative; evidence task-4-stopgate-domain-* passed.
successCriteria.notes: C final review accepted B after positive-vocabulary regression was fixed; no execution/contact/filing behavior added.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: broader legal ontology, debtor graph, route candidate, and MCP tests stay green after decision hardening.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A focused compatibility suite records passing tests across domain decisions, StopGates, route candidates, debtor graph, and MCP tools.
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Leader verification on final master surface 85586bca: task-4-leader-focused-pytest.txt records 52 passed across finance, domain decisions, StopGates, route candidates, debtor context, MCP tools, and domain pipeline; Python 3.9 py_compile, basedpyright, JSON, MCP 25-tool order, PII/path, deployment-boundary, and C contract review evidence all passed.
successCriteria.notes: C artifact copied to task-4-goal4-contract-review.md; code split 85586bca keeps test files under pure-LOC ceiling.

goals.evidence: Goal 4 complete on master 85586bca: A finance/review hardening b7668289, B StopGate safety hardening 9c3c046a, merge commits 8e07f921/4cef7bed, split 85586bca, and C final review accepted. Leader evidence records 52 focused tests passed, Python 3.9 py_compile, basedpyright, JSON validation, MCP 25-tool order, PII/path scan, deployment-boundary scan, and LOC ceiling all passed.

goals.title: Docs final eval and acceptance review
goals.objective: Update docs and working log, run final focused suite/JSON/PII/local MCP checks, and produce an accepted final contract review with no deployment/runbook mutation.

successCriteria.scenario: Docs/log update: update claim-domain ontology docs and the working log with the new source/research/scenario/decision status and remaining TODOs.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Docs smoke finds the key terms and the working log references this wave's final state; PII/path scan has NO_FINDINGS.

successCriteria.scenario: Final eval: run focused test suite, JSON validation, PII/path scan, py_compile/type checks where applicable, and local MCP tool-order smoke.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: Final evidence under .omo/evidence/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/final-* validates and records no deployment/runbook mutation.

successCriteria.scenario: Final review: contract review artifact accepts the wave or records concrete blockers, with no pending checklist-only state.
successCriteria.expectedEvidence: A final review artifact under .omo/teams or .omo/evidence states ACCEPTED or BLOCKED with reproduced verification commands.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/debt-collection-knowledge-expansion-v1/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
